summary: A brief biographical overview of Mark Zuckerberg, detailing his roles as CEO of Meta and co-CEO of the Chan Zuckerberg Initiative. The source highlights his strategic focus on transitioning social technology from 2D screens to the immersive metaverse, as well as his philanthropic goals of eradicating disease and improving education through new scientific tools.

principles.statement: The metaverse is the successor to the mobile internet.
principles.rationale: Moving beyond 2D screens to immersive AR and VR experiences allows people to feel truly present with one another, unlocking new ways to express themselves regardless of physical distance.
principles.source_quote: We believe the metaverse will be the successor to the mobile internet. We’ll be able to feel present, like we’re right there with people, no matter how far apart we actually are.

principles.statement: Scientific breakthroughs are driven by the development of new observational tools.
principles.rationale: Looking at the history of science, major advances consistently follow the creation of new tools that allow us to observe the world differently.
principles.source_quote: If you look at the history of science, most big advances are preceded by new tools to observe things.

principles.statement: A company's daily driving force should be its core mission to connect people.
principles.rationale: Having a singular focus on helping people connect and communicate aligns the entire company's daily efforts and purpose.
principles.source_quote: We’re a company where everyone here wakes up in the morning and thinks about how we’re going to help people connect and communicate.

mental_models.name: Evolution of Social Technology
mental_models.description: Viewing the progression of the internet and social platforms as a necessary shift from flat, 2D screens to fully immersive, embodied experiences (the metaverse) that simulate physical presence.
mental_models.example: Rebranding Facebook to Meta and investing heavily in augmented and virtual reality to build the next generation of social experiences.

signature_quotes.text: We’re a company where everyone here wakes up in the morning and thinks about how we’re going to help people connect and communicate.
We believe the metaverse will be the successor to the mobile internet. We’ll be able to feel present, like we’re right there with people, no matter how far apart we actually are.
If you look at the history of science, most big advances are preceded by new tools to observe things.
